text: [Australian accent] And I'm Jamie Chen. You're watching The Bright Side.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Today on The Bright Side we've got some bloody ripper news. Giant pandas are officially no longer endangered, Queensland's going gangbusters with solar power, and our Lions are still roaring loud. Plus Sam's got your weather forecast looking pretty decent for the week ahead.
